summary: HTTP 422 confirmed but spinner did NOT stop. Warning text still visible (same as #376). 422 caused 2 console errors (vs 1 warning in #376). Side effect: aes.1.1 analytics ping also got 422. Recommendation: ROLLBACK to HTTP 200, accept Tier 1.5.

findings.warning_text_displayed: 앗! Qwen3.6-Plus에 연결하는 데 문제가 있었습니다. [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.
findings.spinner_note: Spinner (rotating arrow) still active below warning text. HTTP 422 did NOT trigger qwen3 error state to stop spinner.
console_detail: ERROR: POST completions?chat_id=... 422 (Unprocessable Entity) — expected from APF
ERROR: POST https://aplus.qwen.ai/aes.1.1 422 (Unprocessable Entity) — SIDE EFFECT, APF matching analytics ping

comparison_with_376.conclusion: 422 adds console errors and aes.1.1 side effect without stopping spinner. No improvement over 200.

recommendation: ROLLBACK to HTTP 200. Accept Tier 1.5 for qwen3. HTTP 422 provides no benefit and adds side effects (aes.1.1 also blocked, extra console errors).
